description: Teamcenter session crashes on login after patch update
resolution: Restart AMS service and apply hotfix KB-1042

description: Unable to export BOM to Excel format
resolution: Update Excel plugin to version 3.2 and restart

description: Teamcenter login page not loading for all users
resolution: Clear browser cache and flush DNS on server

description: Workflow approval email notifications not sending
resolution: Reconfigure SMTP settings in TC admin panel

description: BOM structure showing incorrect parent child relation
resolution: Re-sync BOM data from PLM and rebuild structure cache
Restart AMS service apply patch KB-1042

description: Users cannot access Teamcenter from remote locations
resolution: Enable VPN split tunneling and whitelist TC server IP

description: Active workspace not loading dashboard widgets
resolution: Clear active workspace cache and redeploy widgets

description: BOM export to Excel failing for large assemblies
resolution: Increase Java heap size to 4GB in TC config

description: Password reset emails not being received by users
resolution: Check spam filter rules and whitelist TC email domain
